title: EPS retains Edappadi with massive 42,150 margin; TVK second
summary: AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami retained Edappadi with a thumping 42,150-vote margin, with TVK pushed to second place but registering its presence in his bastion.

title: TVK wins Salem North, South, West and Yercaud — party's urban sweep
summary: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam swept Salem North, South, West and Yercaud, completing an urban sweep of the district and signalling a generational shift in the steel city.

title: Salem West TVK's S. Lakshmanan wins by 74,867 votes — highest in district
summary: Salem West's S. Lakshmanan posted the district's largest victory margin at 74,867 votes, with TVK strategists calling it a vote on civic governance and youth jobs.

title: PMK's S. Sadhasivam wins Mettur, promises Mettur dam elevation project
summary: PMK's S. Sadhasivam captured the Mettur seat and announced that the long-pending Mettur dam elevation project would be his first formal demand in the assembly.

title: Veerapandi AIADMK's M. Rajamuthu thanks Omalur union panchayats for support
summary: AIADMK's Veerapandi winner M. Rajamuthu thanked Omalur union panchayats for consolidated support and said rural water-supply schemes would be his immediate focus.

title: Sankari AIADMK's S. Sundararajan to push for Sankari-Tiruchengodu road widening
summary: Sankari's S. Sundararajan said his constituency-level priority would be to push state highways for the long-delayed Sankari-Tiruchengodu road widening proposal.

title: Attur AIADMK's A.P. Jayasankaran meets weavers, promises powerloom upgrade subsidy
summary: Attur's A.P. Jayasankaran met weavers' associations on May 5 and committed to mobilising state and central subsidy for a powerloom modernisation programme.

title: Gangavalli AIADMK's A. Nallathambi announces check dam construction
summary: Gangavalli's AIADMK MLA A. Nallathambi announced a fresh check dam construction programme across hill-block streams to recharge groundwater in dryland farming villages.

title: Yercaud TVK's G. Chitra — first ST woman MLA from Salem, focuses on coffee growers
summary: Yercaud TVK winner G. Chitra became the first ST woman MLA elected from Salem district and said small coffee growers in the hills would be her constituency priority.

title: Salem Steel Plant workers meet EPS, seek raw material allocation
summary: Salem Steel Plant workers' unions met re-elected MLA Edappadi K. Palaniswami and pressed for a fresh raw material allocation framework with SAIL to stabilise output.

title: Mettur dam water level at 107 ft; farmers demand release for delta
summary: Mettur dam water level touched 107 feet on May 5, prompting Cauvery delta farmer federations to formally demand an early release schedule from the new government.

title: Salem mango growers expect bumper crop, seek cold storage subsidy
summary: Mango growers in Salem reported a bumper crop outlook for 2026 and pressed for a cold storage subsidy package to limit post-harvest losses across the cluster.

title: TVK's Salem city unit to hold thanksgiving rally on May 7
summary: TVK's Salem city unit will hold a public thanksgiving rally on May 7 with all four winning party candidates from the district scheduled to address supporters.

title: AIADMK retains 6 seats; Edappadi EPS says 'will be voice of opposition'
summary: AIADMK retained six Salem district seats and Edappadi K. Palaniswami declared the party would serve as the constructive 'voice of the opposition' in the new assembly.

title: PMK's Mettur victory: party chief Anbumani Ramadoss visits dam site
summary: PMK chief Anbumani Ramadoss visited the Mettur dam site on May 5 to thank voters and to formally launch the party's campaign for the dam elevation project.
